sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current BR: bRb/R?R/bRR
# Try: bbb/R?R/bRR (change (0,1) from R to b)
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 39, 'col': 47}])
print("Result:", last_action_result)
print("Done:", last_action_result.get('done', False))

# Verify
seg = current_frame.segmentation
blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['pixels'] == 36]
br = {}
for b in blocks:
    br_b = b['boundary']
    r, c = br_b[0]
    if 36 <= r < 58 and 36 <= c < 58:
        row, col = (r-36)//8, (c-36)//8
        br[(row,col)] = b['color']

print("\nBottom-right after:")
for row in range(3):
    row_str = ""
    for col in range(3):
        if (row, col) in br:
            row_str += br[(row, col)] + " "
        else:
            row_str += "? "
    print(f"  {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
